title: Ubiquiti Rocket M2 AirMax MIMO outdoor client 2,4GHz
description: Rocket M2 is a powerful outdoor unit for the 2.4GHz band designed for direct mounting on the Ubiquiti airMAX antenna series. Unit allows real communication speeds up to 150+ Mbps .It is ideal for deployment in Point-to-Point ( PtP ) bridging or Point-to-MultiPoint ( PtMP ) airMAX applications.
